posts.author: I-am-Orlando
posts.title: Flying a Union Jack flag is branded a 'tool of hate' in Government's leaked 'social cohesion' strategy

posts.raw_content:
A lot of "conservative" influencers are full of shit. Honestly I'd say they have many similarities to leftwing influencers.

I would never pretend like Trump is infallible. I hope it does not get to the point that he does boots on the ground in Iran and/or the conflict becomes prolonged. I would not be happy with him if it got to that point. But I will not jump to conclusions and say that's what's going to happen, and I think there's a chance it will come out better than that.

However, many of these "conservative" influencers don't actually care about America. They make it a large part of their platform to score gotcha points against Trump and be arrogant about how they're "right" and/or how they're "more MAGA than Trump". 

Except it's pretty obvious that they're not. Fuentes is just an opp, and basically just outright confirmed that recently after saying he's voting Democrat in the midterms, and MTG made herself irrelevant by resigning from Congress and I believe she has ties to codepink.

I wouldn't trust these people any more than I would trust Trump, and I don't think you can say they act entirely in good faith when they largely platform on antagonizing Trump.
posts.author: TheJakeFroggy
posts.title: I believe that people like Nick Fuentes and Marjorie Taylor Greene actually WANT the Iran war to be prolonged and for there to be large amounts of American casualties so they can then capitalize on the situation and paint Trump as a horrible war criminal.
